scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && node ./scripts/verify-web-build.mjs && node ./node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor copy android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && node ./scripts/verify-web-build.mjs && node ./node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync && node ./node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor run android
